title: viola suavis var. catalonica
intro: Viola suavis var. catalonica, also known as the sweet violet of Catalonia, is a subspecies of the sweet violet plant (Viola suavis) native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high content of anthocyanins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Viola suavis var. catalonica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in tea infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, used to treat skin irritations and wounds.
